features: Soft LED Lighting Source: Mr.Go led sphere lamp only use eye-caring led beads, the lighting is soothing and soft to help you calm down or relax. And the led never get hot so it's very safe for kids to cuddle or play with. It's good night companion lamp for baby

16 Static Colors & 4 Dymanic Modes: You will enjoy 16 static lighting options plus 8 brightness settings and 4 color changing effects plus rythm control with this rgb ball lamp. You can easily pick up your desired settings to sleep with or decorate your personal space

Durable Material: The globe shade of this round lamp is made from toy-grade PE, no uv and BPA. Meanwhile, it has excellent shock resistant performance, you don't need worry about it will break if falling off or under presure., it will be a good toy/gift for your family

Battery Powered: This battery operated globe lamp is powered on a 1000mah rechargeable battery. No messy wire and it completely portable, you can place it anywhere or take it with you for outdoor sports. One full charge will last 7 to 48+ hrs, an usb cable and uk plug are included
Wireless Remote Control: This remote control table light is a benefit at night. You can control everything without getting up, it's a good nurseye lamp for moms

IP65 Waterproof: This waterproof ball is built int 2 sets waterproof devices and well sealed with waterproof glue, which means you can use the ball at outdoors as a garden ball, pathyway light, lawn light or decorative lighting for parties, swimming pools, weddings
